description: all touched files are build-system / packaging -> packaging
classifies the author's DEP-3 claim into a category (provenance only)
every changed line is blank or a comment (prose in code) -> documentation
scans added code lines for dangerous constructs -> observations, never a category
all touched files are documentation -> documentation
change normalises to empty (mode-only / pure-decoration) -> packaging
touches only ignore files with ignore-pattern lines -> packaging
not settled by deterministic content rules -> unknown (phase-4 residue)
all touched files are tests (non-shipping) -> test
change differs only in whitespace (no semantic change) -> packaging
